title: Army parachutes onto remote island to help Briton with suspected hantavirus
summary_full: The specialist team parachuted onto Tristan da Cunha, a remote British overseas territory, to treat them.
summary_public: The specialist team parachuted onto Tristan da Cunha, a remote British overseas territory, to treat them.
